entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An important oilseed and food crop of the world (Arachis hypogaea L.).

entities.name: EARLY LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A major destructive disease causing significant yield losses in groundnut.

entities.name: ELS RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut genotypes to resist early leaf spot disease.

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: A region where early leaf spot is a major destructive disease.

entities.name: BURKINA FASO
entities.description: A country in West Africa where early leaf spot causes significant yield losses.

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional breeding approaches used to develop improved varieties resistant to ELS.

entities.name: QTL ANALYSIS
entities.description: Molecular dissection of resistance traits to improve the efficiency of resistance breeding.

entities.name: QH243C
entities.description: An ELS susceptible groundnut genotype used as a parent in the study.

entities.name: NAMA
entities.description: An ELS resistant groundnut genotype used as a parent in the study.

entities.name: F2 POPULATION
entities.description: The second filial generation used for genotyping in marker-trait association analysis.

entities.name: F3 PROGENIES
entities.description: The third filial generation used for phenotypic data collection.

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple sequence repeat markers used for genotyping and marker-trait association.

entities.name: SINGLE MARKER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used for marker-trait association analysis to identify markers associated with ELS resistance.

entities.name: SELECTIVE GENOTYPING
entities.description: A method used for marker-trait association analysis using resistant and susceptible genotypes.

entities.name: GM1911
entities.description: An SSR marker found common between SMA and selective genotyping associated with ELS resistance.

entities.name: GM1883
entities.description: An SSR marker found common between SMA and selective genotyping associated with ELS resistance.

entities.name: GM1000
entities.description: An SSR marker found common between SMA and selective genotyping associated with ELS resistance.

entities.name: SEQ13E09
entities.description: An SSR marker found common between SMA and selective genotyping associated with ELS resistance.

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach using markers for the selection of ELS resistant genotypes.
